About.title: About This Application
About.intro: This Star Trek Seasons Explorer is built as part of the <rsLink>RS School React Course</rsLink>.
About.description: The application allows you to search and explore Star Trek seasons using the Star Trek API (STAPI).
About.author: Developed by <ghLink>ghasnhhz</ghLink> (<repoLink>project repository</repoLink>).
About.feature1: Search for Star Trek seasons by title
About.feature3: View detailed information about each season
